name: djvulibre-python

metadata.name: djvulibre-python
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License (GPL)
metadata.summary: Python support for the DjVu image format

documentation:
*djvulibre-python* is a set of Python bindings for
the `DjVuLibre <https://djvu.sourceforge.net/>`_ library,
an open source implementation of `DjVu <http://djvu.org/>`_.

classes.name: djvu.const.TextZoneType
documentation:
Type of text zone. You can compare text zone types with the < operator.

To create objects of this class, use the get_text_zone_type() function.
